extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME attacked twice in final 4km of Zoncolan, held off YATES who closed hard to limit losses and extend GC lead over DUMOULIN
tactical_patterns: FROOME's double-acceleration strategy at 4km and again inside 2km isolated POZZOVIVO/LÓPEZ/YATES, proving first attack was range-finder.
YATES prioritized time gaps on DUMOULIN over chasing stage win, tactical maturity rarely seen in maglia rosa defense on summit finishes.
POZZOVIVO remains closest GC threat at 23 seconds, outclimbing LÓPEZ when FROOME's second surge shattered chase group.
Sky's willingness to burn FROOME for stage rather than pacing suggests lack of confidence in TT to recover time on YATES.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Double-attack execution on Zoncolan shows form recovery after early-race struggles, confidence reset before final TT
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Controlled effort closing 1-minute gap shows exceptional form management, prioritizing GC over stage vanity
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: Only 23 seconds behind FROOME at finish, podium threat if he survives final time trial
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: Losing significant time to YATES on Zoncolan confirms mountain deficit too large for TT specialty to overcome
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: Early attack attempt on lower slopes faded, lacked acceleration to follow when FROOME launched decisive move
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: Dropped by both FROOME's second attack and YATES' chase effort, losing podium position to POZZOVIVO
